raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/2023 I was in XXXX and took a pedi cab ( bike driven taxi ). After being dropped off the man told me it would be XXXX pounds. I swiped my card and he rode off. Immediately I see a text from citi bank asking if the charge for {$2500.00} was fraudulent. I immediately hit yes and call citi bank ; they cancel my card and send me a new one. I think this is taken care of. However, the pending charge became a posted charge and so yet again I am calling citi bank. They say it must be turned into a dispute since it is a posted charge. I supply the information ; as I do not have a receipt as it was a man on a bike. 
They have " resolved '' my dispute and said it is my responsibility. I am deeply frustrated with how this was handled as I took immediate action and in no way shape or form thought should I be held liable for {$2500.00}. 
I would like citi bank to protect their customers as they claim they do.
